text: NOW: JD Vance arrives in Pakistan for talks with Iranian officials.
text_zh: 即时消息：JD·万斯抵达巴基斯坦，与伊朗官员进行会谈。

text: Alex Jones to Trump: You should be kissing my ass.
text_zh: 亚历克斯·琼斯对特朗普说：你应该亲吻我的屁股。

text: U.S. intelligence suggests China may soon send shoulder-fired air defense missiles (MANPADS) to Iran, possibly via third countries to hide their origin. China denies the claim, calling it false and urging de-escalation. Source: CNN
text_zh: 美国情报显示，中国可能很快会向伊朗提供肩扛式防空导弹（MANPADS），并可能通过第三国转运以掩盖其来源。中国否认了这一说法，称其为虚假信息，并呼吁局势降温。来源：CNN

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Details of the Iranian negotiation team members — The meeting of the Iranian delegation, Mr. Ghalibaf with Mr. Shehbaz Sharif (PM of Pakistan), is scheduled for today, and after this meeting, the details of the Iran-US talks will be clarified. — According to Pakistani announcements, the American delegation also arrived in the country a few minutes ago. — The legal delegation is headed by Mr. Gharibabadi; the economic delegation by Mr. Hemmati, and the military committee by Mr. Ahmadian.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗谈判小组成员详情——伊朗代表团团长卡利巴夫先生定于今天会见巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫，会谈后美伊谈判的细节将更加明朗。——据巴基斯坦方面宣布，美国代表团也已于几分钟前抵达该国。——法律代表团由加里巴巴迪先生率领；经济代表团由赫马蒂先生率领；军事委员会由阿赫马迪安先生率领。

text: Daily summary on the key news of the past 48 hours! — The Handala hacker group has hacked into the phone of former IOF chief of staff Herzi Halevi. — Israeli military is making its move to capture the village of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon. — 700,000 barrels per day cut from Saudi oil production due to US/Israel imposed war on Iran. — DC Bilderberg Meeting kicking off April 9. Topics up for debate are out for off-the-record talks. — Lebanon–Israel talks in Washington next week — AFP. — Hezbollah chief praises bravery, steadfastness of resistance fighters in letter to nation. — U.S. Vice President JD Vance leaves for Islamabad , Pakistan, for talks with Iran. — Negotiation delegations in Pakistan. — "My companions on this flight #Minab168" . — Qatari radars heavily damaged after Iranian drone strikes.
text_zh: 过去48小时重点新闻每日摘要！——Handala黑客组织入侵了前以色列国防军参谋长赫尔齐·哈勒维的手机。——以色列军队正采取行动，试图占领黎巴嫩南部的宾特朱拜勒村。——由于美以对伊朗发动的战争，沙特石油日产量削减了70万桶。——华盛顿比尔德伯格会议将于4月9日开幕。讨论议题已公开，将进行非正式会谈。——黎巴嫩与以色列的会谈将于下周在华盛顿举行——法新社。——真主党领导人在致全国的信中赞扬了抵抗战士的勇敢和坚定。——美国副总统JD·万斯启程前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，与伊朗进行会谈。——谈判代表团齐聚巴基斯坦。——“我这次航班的同伴 #Minab168”。——卡塔尔雷达在伊朗无人机袭击后严重受损。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S. forces are continuing to deploy to the West Asia for potential operations as American and Iranian teams prepare for negotiations in Pakistan Jet fighters and attack planes recently arrived in the Middle East, according to flight-tracking data and a U.S. official. Additionally, 1,500 to 2,000 troops from the Army's elite 82nd Airborne Division could arrive in the coming days, the U.S official said.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 随着美伊团队准备在巴基斯坦进行谈判，美军继续向西亚部署以备潜在行动。据飞行追踪数据和一名美国官员称，喷气式战斗机和攻击机最近已抵达中东。该官员还表示，来自陆军精锐第82空降师的1500至2000名士兵可能会在未来几天内抵达。

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 The last seven hostages from the Kursk region who were held by Ukraine have been released. Russian Human Rights Ombudswoman Tatiana Moskalkova stated that they have left the temporary accommodation center and are heading towards the Ukrainian-Belarusian border. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 库尔斯克地区被乌克兰扣押的最后七名人质已获释。俄罗斯人权专员塔季扬娜·莫斯卡尔科娃表示，他们已离开临时安置中心，正前往乌克兰与白俄罗斯边境。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 An advisor to one of the Asian governments, which is a close ally of the United States, says they are negotiating with the Iranian ambassador and discussing whether their ships can quietly pay safe passage fees through the Strait of Hormuz using digital currency or Chinese yuan. — Wall Street Journal
text_zh: 🇮🇷 一位与美国关系密切的亚洲政府顾问表示，他们正在与伊朗大使进行谈判，讨论其船只是否可以通过数字货币或人民币悄悄支付过路费，以安全通过霍尔木兹海峡。——《华尔街日报》

text: Lebanese state sells south Lebanon again Axios reports that our government has proposed to the Israelis that they return to terrorising only the people of the south with endless attacks, drones surveilling their every move and assassinations. They’re setting the south up to be the sacrificial lamb for Lebanon.
text_zh: 黎巴嫩政府再次出卖黎巴嫩南部。Axios报道称，我们的政府向以色列人提议，让他们继续只通过无休止的袭击、无人机监视和暗杀来恐吓南部人民。他们正把南部变成黎巴嫩的替罪羊。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton Disappears Over Strait of Hormuz After Emergency On April 9, a U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton reconnaissance drone on patrol in the Strait of Hormuz turned towards Iran, emitted an automated “code 7700” alert -- a general signal used for any aircraft in distress -- and fell rapidly from 52,000 feet. When it dropped below 10,000 feet, the signal from its transponder was lost. There has not yet been official confirmation whether the drone crashed, was shot down by an Iranian missile, or whether it somehow recovered and made it back to base.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国海军MQ-4C“海神”无人机在霍尔木兹海峡发生紧急情况后失踪。4月9日，一架在霍尔木兹海峡巡逻的美国海军MQ-4C“海神”侦察无人机转向伊朗方向，发出了自动“7700代码”警报（这是任何飞机遇险时使用的通用信号），并从52000英尺高空迅速坠落。当它降至10000英尺以下时，其应答机信号丢失。目前尚无官方确认该无人机是坠毁、被伊朗导弹击落，还是以某种方式恢复并返回了基地。

text: 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 “You’ve proven to be nothing more than a milking cow.” Hamza Hassan, a Saudi opposition figure to bin Salman, commented on the recent meeting between the Saudi Minister of Finance and Pakistan’s Prime Minister before Iran/US talks begin, writing: “Damn you all! Money at a sensitive time! So, what does Saudi Arabia want from Shehbaz Sharif to do? For example, to use his position as a mediator to pressure the Iranian negotiator, and pass messages that serve the Saudi goal? Is this the Saudi Gulf presence in the negotiations?! Doesn't Trump represent you, as he clearly announced?! Do you want him to get tougher? To turn to your interests and not just Israel's interests? Your money doesn't make victory in mercenary wars. And your money doesn't bring victory to the negotiating table, because what's happening on the table is just a manifestation of the real power on the ground! Praise be to God, you prove that you're nothing but a cash cow looking for a new sponsor”
text_zh: 🇸🇦 🇵🇰 “事实证明，你不过是一头奶牛。”沙特反对派人士哈姆扎·哈桑在评论沙特财政大臣与巴基斯坦总理在伊美会谈开始前的会晤时写道：“诅咒你们所有人！在敏感时刻谈钱！那么，沙特阿拉伯想让夏巴兹·谢里夫做什么？例如，利用他作为调解人的身份向伊朗谈判代表施压，并传递服务于沙特目标的讯息？这就是沙特在谈判中的海湾存在感吗？！特朗普不是代表你们吗，正如他明确宣布的那样？！你们想让他更强硬吗？转向你们的利益，而不仅仅是以色列的利益？你们的钱在雇佣军战争中换不来胜利。你们的钱在谈判桌上也换不来胜利，因为桌上发生的一切只是地面真实力量的体现！感谢上帝，你们证明了自己不过是一头寻找新赞助人的奶牛。”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver air defense systems, including MANPADS, to Iran in the coming weeks. The shipments are reportedly being routed through third countries to obscure their origin, and could help Iran replenish capabilities during the current ceasefire. China denies the claims, saying it has not provided weapons to any party and is working to support de-escalation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 CNN：美国情报显示，中国正准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付包括肩扛式防空导弹（MANPADS）在内的防空系统。据报道，这些货物正通过第三国转运以掩盖其来源，并可能帮助伊朗在当前停火期间补充能力。中国否认了这些指控，称其未向任何一方提供武器，并致力于支持局势降温。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WSJ: U.S. President Trump told attendees of a recent meeting that he will pardon any that came 'withing 200 feet' of the oval office. The comment garned laughs, but seems to reflect Trump's sweeping use of Presidential pardons, issuing around 1,600 as of the time of writing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：美国总统特朗普在最近的一次会议上告诉与会者，他将赦免任何“靠近椭圆形办公室200英尺以内”的人。这一评论引来了笑声，但似乎反映了特朗普对总统赦免权的广泛使用，截至撰写本文时，他已发布了约1600项赦免。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇹🇷 Yediot Ahronot: ‘Less favorable outcome’: Israel sees U.S-Iran war slowing Arab states normalization. Security ties with UAE strengthened, but normalization hit as Arab states may tilt toward Iran and Turkey. Zionist official says outcome ‘less favorable’.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇹🇷 《新消息报》：“不太有利的结果”：以色列认为美伊战争减缓了阿拉伯国家的正常化进程。与阿联酋的安全关系得到加强，但正常化进程受阻，因为阿拉伯国家可能会向伊朗和土耳其倾斜。犹太复国主义官员称结果“不太有利”。

text: ELINT News RT @laraseligman : Iran still has thousands of ballistic missiles in its arsenal that it could use by retrieving launchers from underground storage areas, according to American officials familiar with U.S. intelligence assessments. https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-has-thousands-of-missiles-and-could-retrieve-launchers-u-s-intelligence-finds-eaa230ec?st=VX9bT4&reflink=article_copyURL_share tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @laraseligman：据熟悉美国情报评估的美国官员称，伊朗的武库中仍有数千枚弹道导弹，可以通过从地下储存区取回发射装置来使用。https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-has-thousands-of-missiles-and-could-retrieve-launchers-u-s-intelligence-finds-eaa230ec?st=VX9bT4&reflink=article_copyURL_share 推文

text: 🇷🇺 ☦️ Russian fighters receive special Easter breads for Easter ℹ️ Kulich is a traditional Russian Easter bread baked for Orthodox Easter. It’s tall, slightly sweet, and made with butter, eggs, and dried fruits like raisins. After baking, it’s topped with white sugar glaze and often taken to church to be blessed. Beyond being a dessert, kulich symbolizes the presence of Jesus Christ at the Easter table, as well as His Resurrection and the idea of life overcoming death. It’s also a home version of a sacred church bread representing the body of Christ. The tall shape reflects the transition from earthly to heavenly, and the white glaze stands for purity. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ☦️ 俄罗斯战士收到复活节特制面包 ℹ️ 库利奇（Kulich）是东正教复活节烘焙的传统俄罗斯复活节面包。它很高，略带甜味，由黄油、鸡蛋和葡萄干等干果制成。烘焙后，上面覆盖着白糖霜，通常会被带到教堂祈福。除了作为甜点，库利奇还象征着耶稣基督在复活节餐桌上的存在，以及祂的复活和生命战胜死亡的理念。它也是代表基督身体的神圣教堂面包的家庭版本。高耸的形状反映了从尘世到天堂的过渡，白色的糖霜代表纯洁。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🐻 Grab a coffee and read all the key news you might have missed in the past 24 hours! ➡️ Russia is using new robots for demining in the SMO zone ➡️ Russia attacked the energy and port infrastructure in Odessa ➡️ Zelensky announces Ukraine will enter a difficult period of pressure from Russia on the front and the US in negotiations by September, and wants NATO bases in Ukraine . Oh - and claims that they shot down Iranian drones in the Middle East ➡️ Budanov laments that Ukrainians want victory but don't want to go to the front ➡️ Russia and Cuba are discussing the resumption of flights ➡️ British sources say the Russian frigate Admiral Grigorovich escorted two “shadow tankers” through the English Channel on Wednesday. ➡️ Former Secretary of State John Kerry says Netanyahu asked other US presidents to strike Iran - but only Trump agreed ➡️ The FSB has detained three more members of Shamil Basayev and Khattab's gangs who were involved in attacks on Russian military personnel in 1999–2000 (a good reminder for Zelensky and the gang) ➡️ MAGA influencers are turning on Israel ➡️ And not just MAGA influencers - Spanish PM continues to criticize Israel , Slovenia joins Spain’s effort to suspend the EU–Israel Association Agreement - and Netanyahu says that countries that “wage a diplomatic war” against Israel will pay “an immediate price.” ➡️ Kuomintang leader Zheng Liwen of Taiwan meets with Xi Jinping and says that they cannot let Taiwan become a battlefield ➡️ Chinese FM Wang Yi me t with Kim Jong Un ➡️ Trump says they will open the strait "one way or the other" , and we still don't know if Trump wants no enrichment from Iran, or no nuclear weapons ➡️ Al Jazeera published exclusive footage of the strikes on Ras Laffan Industrial City, located north of Doha, Qatar. ➡️ Iranian delegation arrives in Pakistan for negotiations with the Epstein Coalition , "has goodwill, but no trust" , brings personal belongings of the children killed in the recent strikes 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 喝杯咖啡，阅读过去24小时内你可能错过的所有重点新闻！ ➡️ 俄罗斯正在特别军事行动区使用新型机器人进行排雷 ➡️ 俄罗斯袭击了敖德萨的能源和港口基础设施 ➡️ 泽连斯基宣布乌克兰将在9月前进入俄罗斯在前线施压和美国在谈判中施压的困难时期，并希望在乌克兰建立北约基地。哦——还声称他们在伊朗袭击中击落了伊朗无人机 ➡️ 布达诺夫感叹乌克兰人想要胜利但不想上前线 ➡️ 俄罗斯和古巴正在讨论恢复航班 ➡️ 英国消息人士称，俄罗斯护卫舰“格里戈罗维奇海军上将”号周三护送两艘“影子油轮”穿过英吉利海峡 ➡️ 前国务卿约翰·克里表示，内塔尼亚胡曾要求其他美国总统打击伊朗——但只有特朗普同意 ➡️ 联邦安全局又拘留了三名沙米尔·巴萨耶夫和哈塔卜团伙的成员，他们参与了1999-2000年对俄罗斯军事人员的袭击（给泽连斯基和他的团伙一个很好的提醒） ➡️ MAGA网红正在背离以色列 ➡️ 不仅仅是MAGA网红——西班牙首相继续批评以色列，斯洛文尼亚加入西班牙的努力，暂停欧盟-以色列联系国协定——内塔尼亚胡表示，对以色列“发动外交战争”的国家将付出“即时代价” ➡️ 台湾国民党领导人郑丽文会见习近平，表示不能让台湾成为战场 ➡️ 中国外长王毅会见金正恩 ➡️ 特朗普表示他们将“以某种方式”打开海峡，我们仍然不知道特朗普是想要伊朗零浓缩，还是零核武器 ➡️ 半岛电视台发布了袭击卡塔尔多哈北部拉斯拉凡工业城的独家画面 ➡️ 伊朗代表团抵达巴基斯坦与“爱泼斯坦联盟”进行谈判，“有善意，但没有信任”，带来了在最近袭击中丧生的儿童的个人物品 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran Still Has Thousands of Missiles and Could Retrieve Launchers, U.S. Assesses
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国评估：伊朗仍有数千枚导弹，并可能取回发射装置

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 In complete violation of the ceasefire understandings, ‘Israel’ bombs southern Lebanon once again.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 完全违反停火协议，“以色列”再次轰炸黎巴嫩南部。

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @laurnorman : On a more serious note, my recent profile of @mb_ghalibaf . https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-who-is-mohammad-bagher-ghalibaf-3c3ecf3e tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @laurnorman：更严肃地说，我最近对 @mb_ghalibaf 的个人资料介绍。https://www.wsj.com/world/middle-east/iran-who-is-mohammad-bagher-ghalibaf-3c3ecf3e 推文

text: WarMonitor The Artemis II astronauts have exited the capsule onto a recovery raft, where they’re secured and lifted by helicopter to the ship’s deck before heading for a more thorough medical evaluation. It really is an amazing thing to see. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042789812311089572/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：“阿耳忒弥斯2号”宇航员已离开太空舱进入回收筏，在那里他们被固定并由直升机吊起至船甲板，随后将进行更彻底的医疗评估。这确实是一件令人惊叹的事情。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042789812311089572/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Reuters : The Board of Peace has received only a fraction of the $17 billion pledged for the reconstruction of Gaza, hindering the US president's plan for the region's future. The funding pledges, made by ten countries, have not been fulfilled, with only the United Arab Emirates, Morocco, and the US contributing so far, totaling under $1 billion. The lack of funding has prevented the committee from entering Gaza, and disarmament talks between Hamas and Israel remain in deadlock, with Israel demanding Hamas lay down its arms before withdrawing its troops. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 路透社：和平委员会仅收到了承诺用于加沙重建的170亿美元中的一小部分，阻碍了美国总统对该地区未来的计划。十个国家做出的资金承诺尚未兑现，目前只有阿拉伯联合酋长国、摩洛哥和美国做出了贡献，总额不到10亿美元。资金匮乏导致委员会无法进入加沙，哈马斯与以色列之间的裁军谈判仍处于僵局，以色列要求哈马斯在撤军前放下武器。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV: Two Israeli airstrikes targeted the towns of Toul and Jibchit in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 MTV：两次以色列空袭袭击了黎巴嫩南部的图尔（Toul）和吉布奇特（Jibchit）镇。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender All four crew members, NASA astronaut Reid Wiseman, Artemis II commander, NASA astronaut Victor Glover, Artemis II pilot, NASA astronaut Christina Koch, Artemis II mission specialist, and Canadian Space Agency (CSA) astronaut Jeremy Hansen, Artemis II mission specialist have now exited the crew module and are now in the inflatable “front porch.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：所有四名机组人员，阿耳忒弥斯2号指挥官、NASA宇航员里德·怀斯曼，阿耳忒弥斯2号飞行员、NASA宇航员维克多·格洛弗，阿耳忒弥斯2号任务专家、NASA宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫，以及阿耳忒弥斯2号任务专家、加拿大航天局（CSA）宇航员杰里米·汉森，现已离开乘员舱，进入充气式“前廊”。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - All four Artemis II astronauts emerge from spacecraft for first time since moon launch on April 1st. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042779226202358002/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 即时消息——所有四名“阿耳忒弥斯2号”宇航员自4月1日登月以来首次走出航天器。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042779226202358002/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender 3 crew members have now exited the crew module. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042778237802078288/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：3名机组人员现已离开乘员舱。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2042778237802078288/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @TheIntelFrog : It appears that the early warning radar in Qatar was hit by multiple Iranian drones causing more than superficial damage. Multiple hits in the same attack indicates that if air defenses were present, they were overwhelmed or otherwise ineffective. Photos published by Al Jazeera for the first time reveal damage caused by Iranian strikes on the U.S.-made AN/FPS-132 Block 5 (SSPARS) ballistic missile early warning radar in Qatar. The damage appears to be more extensive than what is visible in satellite imagery. https://twitter.com/EGYOSINT/status/2042702139818905756/photo/1 - Egypt's Intel Observer tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @TheIntelFrog：看来卡塔尔的预警雷达被多架伊朗无人机击中，造成了非表面损伤。同一次袭击中的多次命中表明，如果当时有防空系统，它们要么被压制，要么无效。半岛电视台首次公布的照片揭示了伊朗袭击卡塔尔美制AN/FPS-132 Block 5 (SSPARS) 弹道导弹预警雷达造成的损坏。损坏程度似乎比卫星图像中看到的更为严重。https://twitter.com/EGYOSINT/status/2042702139818905756/photo/1 - 埃及情报观察员 推文

text: WSJ: Both Saudi Arabia and the UAE are refusing to ship oil through the strait while it is under Iranian control. This is an unofficial oil embargo that will lead to higher oil prices and force others to intervene, according to Gulf officials
text_zh: 《华尔街日报》：沙特阿拉伯和阿联酋都拒绝在海峡处于伊朗控制下时通过该海峡运输石油。据海湾官员称，这是一项非官方的石油禁运，将导致油价上涨并迫使其他国家进行干预

text: Life is a miracle by God and a sacred journey to make Only Jews destroy lives and steal futures without any regards
text_zh: 生命是上帝创造的奇迹，也是一场神圣的旅程。只有犹太人会肆无忌惮地摧毁生命、窃取未来
